name: Ferro-Steel
description: A ubiquitous structural alloy smelted from iron-rich ores. The backbone of every colony's construction industry.

name: Copper Composite
description: Refined copper blended with trace conductors. Essential for wiring, circuitry, and low-grade energy conduits.

name: Titanium Plate
description: Cold-rolled titanium sheeting favoured for lightweight hull plating and orbital habitat panels.

name: Silicon Wafers
description: Ultra-pure semiconductor blanks used in every computing device from handheld terminals to shipboard AI cores.

name: Carbon Fibre
description: High-tensile woven carbon lattice. Lighter than steel and nearly as strong, ideal for ship spars and armour underlays.

name: Polymer Resin
description: Versatile synthetic polymer used in seals, insulation, medical equipment, and consumer goods.

name: Grain Stocks
description: Bulk staple cereals and legumes. Every colony needs a steady supply to keep its population fed and productive.

name: Synth-Protein
description: Vat-grown protein cultures that supplement natural agriculture. Nutritious, bland, and cheap to produce.

name: Hydroponic Produce
description: Fresh fruit and vegetables cultivated under artificial light. A morale booster on any station or colony world.

name: Chemical Reagents
description: A standardised palette of industrial chemicals: acids, bases, solvents, and catalysts for manufacturing.

name: Power Cells
description: Compact energy storage units rated for civilian and military use. The standard currency of portable power.

name: Hydrogen Fuel
description: Compressed deuterium-enriched hydrogen harvested from gas giants and ice worlds. Powers most sublight drives.

name: Ceramic Composites
description: Heat-resistant layered ceramics used in re-entry shielding, reactor linings, and thermal armour.

name: Optical Glass
description: Precision-ground crystalline glass for sensor arrays, telescope lenses, and laser focusing assemblies.

name: Textiles
description: Woven fabrics ranging from durable workwear to fine silks. Colonists care about more than survival.

name: Medical Supplies
description: Sterile instruments, bandages, anaesthetics, and broad-spectrum antibiotics. Always in demand.

name: Superconductors
description: Room-temperature superconducting wire essential for maglev systems, shield emitters, and power distribution.

name: Nano-Assemblers
description: Programmable molecular machines that can fabricate complex structures atom by atom. Fragile and expendable.

name: Consumer Electronics
description: Personal devices, entertainment systems, and domestic appliances. Empires with happy citizens are stable empires.

name: Construction Materials
description: Pre-fabricated structural sections, insulation, and sealant kits for rapid colony expansion.

name: Duranium Alloy
description: A dense, impact-resistant alloy forged under extreme pressure. Required for cruiser-weight and heavier hull plating.

name: Neutronium Threads
description: Impossibly thin filaments of degenerate matter, woven into composite armour. Produced only near neutron stars.

name: Rare Earth Concentrate
description: Refined lanthanides and actinides critical for advanced sensor arrays, targeting computers, and quantum processors.

name: Bio-Enzymes
description: Complex biological catalysts harvested from exotic ecosystems. Vital for gene therapy, bio-weapons, and longevity treatments.

name: Helium-3 Refined
description: Purified helium-3 isotope, the premium fuel for aneutronic fusion reactors. Scarce outside gas giant atmospheres.

name: Psionic Crystals
description: Naturally resonant crystals attuned to psionic frequencies. The Vaelori consider them sacred; everyone else considers them strategic.

name: Plasma Conduit Gel
description: A magnetically responsive gel used to line plasma weapon barrels and reactor containment vessels. Volatile if mishandled.

name: Graviton Lenses
description: Precision-machined exotic-matter optics that bend gravity itself. Used in tractor beams, jump drives, and heavy weapons.

name: Cryo-Stasis Compound
description: A biochemical mixture that enables safe long-duration hibernation. Prized for colony ships and elite medical facilities.

name: Quantum Processors
description: Error-corrected qubit arrays operating at near-absolute zero. The computational backbone of late-era research and targeting systems.

name: Anti-Matter Containment Substrate
description: A lattice of exotic meta-materials capable of suspending anti-matter particles without annihilation. The foundation of anti-matter age weaponry.

name: Quantum Entanglement Medium
description: A crystalline medium pre-seeded with entangled particle pairs, enabling instantaneous communication across any distance. Singularity-age technology.

name: Precursor Alloy
description: An impossibly resilient metal recovered from ancient alien ruins. No known forge can replicate it; the supply is finite and irreplaceable.

name: Dark Energy Conduit
description: A self-sustaining loop of harnessed dark energy, capable of powering shields that warp spacetime. Only singularity-age civilisations can manufacture them.

name: Neural Lattice Compound
description: A bio-synthetic mesh that interfaces directly with neural tissue, amplifying psionic ability a thousandfold. The key to singularity-age psionic technology.
